title: PS - Asymptotic Analysis
description: Problem set rubric template for asymptotic analysis questions.

criteria.title: Runtime Analysis
criteria.description: Student derives and justifies the asymptotic runtime of the algorithm.

levels.title: Complete
levels.description: Correct asymptotic runtime with clear and complete justification.

levels.title: Partial
levels.description: Partially correct runtime or incomplete/unclear justification.

criteria.title: Recurrence Relation
criteria.description: Student sets up and solves the recurrence relation correctly.

levels.title: Complete
levels.description: Correct recurrence and correct closed-form solution.

levels.title: Partial
levels.description: Correct recurrence but minor error in solution, or vice versa.

criteria.title: Written Explanation
criteria.description: Student explains reasoning clearly using correct asymptotic notation.

levels.title: Clear
levels.description: Explanation is clear, correct notation used throughout.

levels.title: Partial
levels.description: Some explanation but unclear or notation errors.
